## Linear issue

<!-- Link this PR to a Linear issue so status updates automatically and the commit appears on the ticket. -->

- **Fixes TECH-XXX** — use when this PR fully delivers the issue (Linear will move it to **Done** when merged).
- **Ref TECH-XXX** / **Part of TECH-XXX** — use when this PR is only part of the work or you don’t want auto-close.

Example: `Fixes TECH-3` or `Ref TECH-5, TECH-6`

## Type of change

<!-- Tick one. -->

- [ ] **Feature** (new behaviour or capability)
- [ ] **Bug fix** (fixes an existing bug)
- [ ] **Chore** (tooling, config, docs, no user-facing change)
- [ ] **Refactor** (no behaviour change, code structure only)

## Checklist before request review

- [ ] Branch name includes the Linear issue ID (e.g. `feat/TECH-3-description`).
- [ ] At least one commit message or this description references the issue (e.g. `Fixes TECH-XXX`).
- [ ] Code runs locally / passes existing checks (if any).
- [ ] No secrets or env values committed (use `.env` and `.env.example` only for docs).
